records.question: Which stadiums hosted events in 2014 and have a capacity of at most 67500?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT stadium.id FROM stadium
JOIN event ON stadium.id = event.stadium_id
WHERE event.year = '2014' AND stadium.capacity <= 67500
records.pred_sql:
SELECT stadium.ID
FROM stadium
JOIN event ON stadium.ID = event.Stadium_ID
WHERE event.Year = '2014' AND stadium.Capacity <= 67500
